name: Tipsy Chocolate Pecan Crunch Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 1 oz Unsweetened chocolate (broken into 1/2 oz pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Toast the pecan halves on a baking sheet in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes. Cool to room temperature.
3. In a 2 1/2-quart saucepan, combine 1 1/4 cups sugar and lemon juice. Stir with a whisk until combined (the sugar will resemble moist sand).
4. Caramelize the sugar mixture over medium-high heat for 8-10 minutes, stirring constantly with a whisk to break up any lumps (the sugar will first turn clear as it liquefies, then light brown as it caramelizes). Remove from heat.
5. Add the unsweetened chocolate and stir gently to blend.
6. Pour the chocolate-caramel mixture over the pecans and stir with a spoon to completely coat the pecans with the chocolate caramel. Spread evenly on the baking sheet.
7. Freeze the chocolate pecan crunch for 20 minutes. Remove from freezer.
8. Chop the chocolate pecan crunch into 1/4" pieces. Store in a sealed plastic container until needed.
